query:
SELECT te.event_code, te.event_name, te.event_date, te.driver_score, te.auto_score, te.skills_score, te.teamwork_rank, te.avg_teamwork_score
FROM team_events te
WHERE te.team_number = '81777A'
ORDER BY te.event_date;

SELECT COUNT(*) as match_count, SUM(CASE WHEN won = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as wins
FROM team_matches
WHERE team_number = '81777A';

SELECT event_name, match_number, partner_team, alliance_score, opponent_score, won
FROM team_matches
WHERE team_number = '81777A'
ORDER BY event_name, match_number
LIMIT 10;
